description_long: This modern bungalow is enclosed by a low stone wall and features a flat roof with clean, geometric lines. The main structure is two stories, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. A driveway leads to a covered carport with a pergola-style roof, sheltering two vehicles and partially shaded by palm trees. The landscaping includes several tall palm trees and a paved courtyard area, providing a blend of greenery and hardscape. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color palette, with dark gray paving contrasting against the white walls. The overall design emphasizes openness, minimalism, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a covered carport, and palm landscaping, all enclosed by a low stone wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, palm trees, and the carport with two vehicles under a pergola roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, pergola roof, and the stone wall enclosure, with palm trees visible behind the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the flat roof, and the paved courtyard area with palm trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the large windows, main entrance, and the landscaped courtyard with a palm tree near the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and grouped side windows
